race.comment: ROMANTICISM (9) exciting fresh filly resuming. Came to the end of her prep when up in grade and trip with a tiring last over 1400m in the Albury Guineas last March. Has a good record on her home track and back with one 750m trial. Look for her launching late. MOLTEUNO (8) raced without luck in town at her last two starts and is undefeated in three starts on her home track. Covered plenty of ground in the run with a tiring eleventh over 1300m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class. Will roll forward and prove hard to catch. EXTRIO (1) just under a month between runs when she raced on the speed for a tough fifth over 1200m at Rosehill in Highway class. Only has to hold that form to go close. DANCER'S DELIGHT (3) is back for his second prep and is building a solid winning CV. Rounded them up with ease first-up from the outside barrier over 1100m at this track in the soft (7) going. Has further upside and can keep the winning momentum going.
